# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Navigation Command Final v41

## Corrections

- Corrects the v40 failure where a legacy v38 navigation kernel could fail during post-build checks.
- Removes menu-over-menu behavior by enforcing a single native header plus one floating Site Command.
- Replaces the Command Center with a standalone searchable route catalog that does not require the legacy v38 top-menu injector.
- Keeps all pages, demos, proof rooms, legal boundaries, expert surfaces, and public data contracts.

## Verification target

The publisher now checks that the homepage and Command Center do not include legacy top-menu injectors such as `navigation-v38.js`, `site-shell.js`, `site-guide.js`, or `navigation-atlas.js`.
